category_sources: source_facts.description says Squiid does advanced algebraic and RPN calculations; official GitLab project description says it is an advanced calculator written in Rust with a terminal UI supporting RPN and algebraic input.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab project page title is Squiid; source_facts.name is squiid.
docs_sources: Official GitLab project exposes a README as the primary repository documentation; source_facts.homepage is the official project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive points to gitlab.com/ImaginaryInfinity/squiid-calculator/squiid, and the official GitLab project page identifies Squiid.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies algebraic and RPN calculations; official GitLab project topics include Rust, calculator, and rpn, and its description mentions a terminal user interface.
